query:
ALTER TABLE `complaints` ADD `protocolNumber` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT CONCAT('DENUNCIA-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'));
ALTER TABLE `complaints` ADD CONSTRAINT `complaints_protocolNumber_unique` UNIQUE(`protocolNumber`);
